outputs_written.topic: make a report on rise of AI
outputs_written.text: The evolution of Artificial Intelligence (AI) demonstrates a rapid trajectory from mid-20th-century theoretical frameworks to a transformative global economic force. Rooted in foundational milestones such as Alan Turing’s 1950 proposal of the Turing test [13], Arthur Samuel’s pioneering 1952 checkers program [14], and Newell and Simon’s early problem-solving algorithms [15], the discipline was officially established at the 1956 Dartmouth Summer Research Project [12].
